name: Krzysztof Nowak
message:
Good morning,

I am an analyst specialising in process automation within the finance and industrial sectors. 

For several years, I have been supporting operational staff in improving their efficiency when working with data using a variety of platforms.

If you are looking for someone with a similar profile, I would be grateful if you could get in touch.

Kind regards
